crée/cree.description: [Traduction en cours] This creates a new ~l:date~ item in the supplied container - usually a ~l:div|k|browser~ - and initialized with the given values.

date.description:
[Traduction en cours] This declares a ~m:<date>~ variable. You can create a new ~m:date~ element with ~l:create~.

A ~m:date~ is a compound component consisting of 3 fields, for year, month and day. The component handles its own interactions, adjusting itself for months of different lengths and also for leap years.

définis/definis.description: [Traduction en cours] This sets the value of the ~m:date~ component to the timestamp given. Timestamps are the number of seconds since January 1, 1970 (the Unix epoch).
définis/definis.examples: définis/definis StartDate à/a maintenant%0adéfinis/definis FinishDate à/a FutureDate

horodatage de.description: [Traduction en cours] Converts the date currently held by the ~l:date|k~ component to a Unit timestamp.
horodatage de.examples: mets le/la/les/l horodatage de IssueDate à/a SomeDate

date de.description: [Traduction en cours] Converts the date currently held by the ~l:date|k~ component to a text string of the form "{day} {month} {year}", for example "15 July 2014".
date de.examples: mets le/la/les/l date de ActionDate dans Buffer

crée/cree.description: [Traduction en cours] This creates a new ~m:date~ item in the supplied container - usually a ~l:div|k|browser~ - initialized with the given values.

date.description: [Traduction en cours] This declares a ~m:<date>~ variable. You can create a new ~m:date~ element with ~l:create~.
